framework.name: Ocado Feature Store Pattern
framework.description: Ocado's fraud detection pipeline uses Google Cloud Datastore as a feature store enriching real-time predictions with historical customer/transaction features from BigQuery. Daily retraining schedule with Apache Beam for feature engineering. Human-in-the-loop fraud agent for edge cases where model confidence is low.
framework.raw_quote: Google Cloud Datastore serves as the feature store... a fraud agent is used as the human-in-the-loop subject matter expert

source.title: How These 8 Companies Implement MLOps: In-Depth Guide
